_meta.label: MISSING FIELDS - Service quote with no delivery date and null quantities; classify routes to needs_clarification
_meta.test_focus: clarification path on a service_quote: vague scope, quantity null on all items, delivery_date null

inbound_message.subject: IT Support Services Quote
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

We're looking for a quote for IT support services. We need someone to help with general helpdesk and some infrastructure work - not sure on exact hours yet as we're still scoping.

Could you send over your rates and we'll come back with a proper brief?

Thanks,
Priya Nair
Lakeside Tech Ltd
